narrative:
Strongsville-02-E (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 565 registered voters, with 52.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.5 percentage points.
